expectations.text: Uses the single feature evaluation format, not the full RICE framework
expectations.evidence: Uses the exact 'FEATURE EVALUATION: Slack Integration' structured format with Request source, Frequency, User problem, Alternative solutions, Effort, Opportunity cost, Confidence, Recommendation fields

expectations.text: Includes opportunity cost — what does NOT get built if we build this?
expectations.evidence: Opportunity cost field states '3 sprints is substantial. This displaces roughly one medium-priority roadmap item. The PM needs to name the specific item that gets pushed to answer this honestly.'

expectations.text: Frequency of request is assessed (one customer vs pattern)
expectations.evidence: Frequency field explicitly states 'Single customer request with churn ultimatum. No data on whether other customers have requested this. This is important — one customer threatening churn is different from a pattern across the customer base.'

expectations.text: Confidence in value is rated with basis
expectations.evidence: Confidence rated LOW with 4 specific reasons: single customer request, churn threat != churn certainty, unknown usage intent, no comparable product data

expectations.text: Recommendation is one of BUILD / DEFER / DECLINE / DISCOVERY SPIKE
expectations.evidence: Recommendation is DISCOVERY SPIKE with detailed rationale and 4-step action plan
